description.value: A tiny, dependency-free Rust binary that reads SOPEERCRED off a unix socket and injects the caller's UID/GID/PID into requests.  The claude-box launcher (launcherd) uses it to identify in-box callers by UID — so authority is anchored to who is calling*, not a forgeable token. …
